name: Mercer Bancorp, Inc.
business: Mercer Bancorp conducts its operations primarily through Mercer Savings Bank, which takes deposits from the general public and invests those deposits in one- to four-family residential mortgage loans and agricultural real estate loans secured by properties located in its primary market area.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in Mercer and Darke Counties, Ohio, and Adams and Jay Counties, Indiana

exposures.sentence: Our loan portfolio consists primarily of residential mortgage loans secured by one- to four-family residential properties and agricultural real estate loans secured by farmland located in our primary market area.

Our loan portfolio consists primarily of residential mortgage loans secured by one- to four-family residential properties and agricultural real estate loans secured by farmland located in our primary market area.
In January 2023, we began implementing an indirect automobile lending program, in which loan applications are referred to us by car dealerships.

catalysts.event: Begin marketing indirect auto loan pools to investor banks
catalysts.sentence: Efforts to market indirect auto loan pools to investor banks are currently anticipated to begin in the second calendar quarter of 2026.
